description: Inference-time AN11(c) JSD gate configuration. Consumed by tool/inference_cert_gate.hexa. threshold is in nats (base-e ln), ~0.22 of ln(2)=0.693. baseline_dist_path is a JSON file mapping token_id -> probability summing to ~1.0; the stub below routes to a placeholder path — substitute with a real baseline (e.g. state/<dest>_baseline_token_dist.json) before landing an enforcing gate.
